query: SELECT 'Categorias' as tipo, COUNT(*) as total FROM categories WHERE establishmentId = 210001 UNION ALL SELECT 'Produtos', COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE establishmentId = 210001 UNION ALL SELECT 'Grupos Compl.', COUNT(*) FROM complementGroups cg JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 210001 UNION ALL SELECT 'Itens Compl.', COUNT(*) FROM complementItems ci JOIN complementGroups cg ON ci.groupId = cg.id JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 210001;
